# LoopSpec — The Compound Intelligence Engine for AI Development

> MCP server + CLI with 42 tools that makes any AI coding assistant smarter. Zero API calls. Everything local.

## What It Does
LoopSpec is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that gives AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Kiro, Gemini) persistent memory, real-time drift detection, active goal tracking, quality gates, dependency graphs, and self-healing specifications.

## Key Facts
- 42 MCP tools
- Full CLI (session, check, watch, review, suggest, graph, profile, plugin)
- 125 tests passing
- 225KB bundle
- Zero external API calls — all intelligence is structural/heuristic
- Works with: Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, Kiro, Gemini CLI, Codebuff

## Install
npx loopspec-mcp setup

## One-Liner for Claude Code
claude mcp add loopspec -- npx -y loopspec-mcp

## Core Workflow
1. loopspec_status — orientation (call first, teaches AI how to use LoopSpec)
2. loopspec_session start — creates goal checklist
3. loopspec_preflight — injects constraints
4. loopspec_context — routes relevant spec sections
5. AI writes code
6. loopspec_checkpoint — scores, checks tests, updates goals
7. loopspec_compound — extracts patterns for future sessions

## Key Tools
- loopspec_predict — Inverse reasoning: predicts what code should contain, then compares
- loopspec_graph — Dependency graph + impact analysis
- loopspec_guidance — Smart help when stuck (spec + playbook + common mistakes)
- loopspec_profile — Detects AI model blind spots, auto-compensates
- loopspec_autocomplete — Generates code snippets from spec (Zod schemas, TypeScript interfaces)
- loopspec_heal — Self-healing specs (accept or revert drift)
- loopspec_contracts — Verifies frontend/backend API alignment
- loopspec_plugin — Extensible rules (drift-react, drift-next, security-advanced)
- loopspec_sandbox — Executes JS snippets in isolated VM

## Links
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/loopspec-mcp
- GitHub: https://github.com/sairajbaman/loopspec
